name: 海豹短刀（★） | 表面淬火
nameZh: 海豹短刀（★） | 表面淬火
descriptionEn: A classic of the Counter-Strike series, the edge of this knife is press-fit Stellite perfectly held in place due to its precise fit with the titanium on the blade's cheek and spine. The handle is fossilized mastodon ivory held in a carbon fibre pocket. It has been color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A little color never hurt anyone
descriptionZh: 作为反恐精英系列的经典物品，这把刀的刀锋由钴基合金压制，与钛制刀片、龙骨精准结合。整把刀浑然一体。握柄采用了碳纤维包裹的石化乳齿象牙。 通过木炭在高温下的应用，这把武器已被彩色表面淬火。 一点彩色痕迹无伤大雅
